name: ruby-spider
title: ruby-spider
description:
web spidering library for Ruby
spider handles the robots.txt, scraping, collecting and looping so that
you can just handle the data.
.
spider is useful to applications that need gather data from web sites.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-spider because web spidering library for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-spider as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-spider with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-spider --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
